hits.title: Equinor quits another offshore wind market
hits.summary: Equinor is quitting the Japanese offshore wind power market, shortly after dropping its broader capacity target for renewable energy deployment.

hits.title: Sany signs deal for Egypt's first wind turbine factory
hits.summary: Egypt has signed a memorandum of understanding with Chinese manufacturer Sany to build the country's first wind turbine factory, as well as a 2GW wind project in the Gulf of Suez.

hits.title: Germany awards 2.5GW capacity in latest onshore wind auction
hits.summary: Germany awarded contracts for nearly 2.5GW of onshore wind capacity in its latest auction round, with the tender once again "significantly oversubscribed” and awarded prices continuing to fall.

hits.title: Rare artefacts found at Hornsea 3 offshore wind site
hits.summary: Investigators have found rare lead ingots on a 17th century shipwreck at the site of Ørsted’s Hornsea 3 project, which is due to become one of the world’s largest offshore wind farms.

hits.title: UK wind curtailment rises due to slow grid expansion
hits.summary: The slow pace of electrification could see much of the UK’s rapid progress on offshore wind go to waste, according to a new report from the country’s climate watchdog.

hits.title: Turkey publishes draft rules for 1GW offshore wind auction
hits.summary: Turkey has published draft specifications for its first 1GW offshore wind auction, which include allowing developers to return awarded sites under certain conditions.

hits.title: California joins fight against Trump’s offshore wind ‘backroom buyouts’
hits.summary: The state of California has warned it will sue the US Department of the Interior (DOI) if the Trump administration proceeds with its “illegal” deal to reimburse Golden State Wind $120 million over an offshore wind lease off central California.

hits.title: Germany proposes offshore wind area changes ahead of 2027 tender
hits.summary: Germany has proposed changes to future offshore wind areas, tender schedules and grid connection plans in the North Sea in a bid to improve electricity yields and economic viability.

hits.title: Goldwind re-routes wind turbine parts to avoid Hormuz crisis
hits.summary: Goldwind has re-routed the first set of wind turbine components it is supplying to two major onshore wind farm projects in Saudi Arabia following delays linked to the US-Israeli war on Iran.

Enercon outsources Turkish generator and tower production
hits.summary: German wind turbine maker Enercon has signed agreements with Turkish firms to manufacture generators and towers for its E-175 EP5 E2 model in the country.

hits.title: Pressure mounts for CfD-backed auctions amid German offshore wind uncertainty
hits.summary: The German government is facing calls to amend its offshore wind tender system and offer new round this year amid reports that TotalEnergies and Jera Nex BP are looking to renege on major offshore wind seabed leases in the German North Sea.

hits.title: Canada wins lengthy dispute over US developer's dormant offshore wind project
hits.summary: The government of Canada has won a near-decade long legal case against a US developer over compensation for an offshore wind farm in Lake Ontario that was never built.

hits.title: Amazon signs largest PPA in Germany with Skyborn
hits.summary: Amazon has signed a 600MW power purchase agreement (PPA) with Skyborn Renewables for electricity generated by the Gennaker offshore wind farm in the German Baltic Sea.
